description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a landscaped environment featuring rocky outcrops and pink-flowering plants. The main building is rectangular with a flat roof, large windows, and a prominent front entrance. A driveway leads up to the house, with a red car parked in front, and a detached white gazebo is situated to the side. The property is surrounded by natural rock formations, creating a secluded and scenic atmosphere. The exterior of the bungalow is finished in white, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The overall scene suggests a private, contemporary residence integrated into a natural landscape.
description: A modern white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a driveway, surrounded by rocky outcrops and pink-flowering plants, with a detached gazebo nearby.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, red car, and detached gazebo, with rocky outcrops and pink plants in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rocky formations wrapping around the property and the side of the bungalow, with the gazebo and car partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the rocky outcrops and pink plants, with the back of the bungalow and gazebo visible in the distance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the bungalow, driveway, and gazebo, with rocks and plants framing the scene.
